title: Shika to Kanta
synopsis: One day, Kanta, a lonely boy, rescues an orphaned baby sika deer and names it Poyu. There is something special about Poyu, his golden tail. When hunters go after Poyu, Kanta is determined to protect his golden-tailed friend and the other deer. (Source: myanimelist ) Adapted from a children's novel with the same name, written by Daisaku Ikeda and illustrated by Sho Murakami. It tells the sad history of overhunting of sika deer by humans, as well as the friendship between sika deer and children.

title: Kongque Gongzhu
synopsis: Nanma Nuona, the seventh princess of the Peacock Kingdom has six sisters. One day, the seven sisters went to the Golden Lake to bathe and play, and happened to bumped into Zhao Shutun, the prince of Banzha. Zhao Shutun and Nanma Nuona fell in love at first sight, and the two soon set a wedding date. The prime minister of Banzha, Ma Haxian, is a very insidious, cunning and ambitious man who is determined to gain power and usurp the throne. He hopes to marry his daughter to Zhao Shutun, but the appearance of Nanma Nuona ruins his plans.

synopsis: Young Chup is saved by a dragon named Flam, whose kid, Lenny, has despised humans ever since one killed his twin brother.

title: Kumo no Gakkou
synopsis: Near the end of the 19th century, a young boy loses his father and has to move from a comfortable city to a poor village in Saitama. There, living with his mother, elder sister, and a dog, he learns valuable lessons about what's truly important in life.

title: Friend Ship
synopsis: Graduation work of Saeko Suzuki at Tama Art University.

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Magic Candies
synopsis: “Playing alone isn’t so bad.” The other kids at the park never ask Dong-Dong to play. That’s ok. He’s fine just playing marbles on his own. One day, he buys a bag of colorful candies instead of new marbles. The first time he pops one of them into his mouth, his old sofa starts talking to him! The two share an unexpected conversation before the sweet melts away. As it happens, the people, animals, and objects in Dong-Dong’s life have a lot to say. (Source: Toei Animation website)

title: The Body Swap Center
synopsis: Mimi is fed up with her pathetic self. One day she walks along looking at the ground like usual when she notices a suspicious flyer. Graduate Work 2018, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Horizon Blue
synopsis: It depicts the problems of child abuse and dysfunctional families in Japan. Harada, who completed "Midori", made this movie alone over 24 years. (Source: YouTube description)

title: Koe wo Kikasete
synopsis: An educational film about mobile phone addictions in Japan.

title: Destiny
synopsis: Yui has become estranged from her boyfriend, who doesn’t even wish her happy birthday. Her friend Aya introduces a fortune teller said to be the real deal. What does destiny hold for them? This is a romantic comedy made during self-quarantine. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: RED FOREST
synopsis: Amii runs and runs on a bloodstained earth, through dark forests and warm fields. She keeps running in fear. Graduate Work 2016 by Yikun Wang, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Firewood, Kanta & Grandpa
titleRomaji: Takigi to Kanta to Jiji to
titleNative: 薪とカンタとじいじいと
synonyms: Takigi to Kanta to Jii Jii to
synopsis: A puppet animation set in a mountain village in Japan. Outside a village in deep snow, there lived a boy named Kanta and his grandpa. One day, the grandpa gets sick and plenty of firewood they had at home is running out. Without firewood, the grandpa may freeze to death. Kanta makes up his mind to go get some firewood by himself from the woodshed. In spite of his willingness, little boy Kanta fears the woodshed; it seems very spooky at midnight and far away. Kanta gathers all his courage and steps forward. In the end, Kanta makes a very small and yet precious finding

title: Kkomimanyeo Rara Season 1
synopsis: The Porr School of Magic is home to aspiring witches. Our protagonist Lara quickly begins to make friends, despite the school's best student, Gina, resenting Lara for being from a non magical family. Lara's energetic, witty, and charming personality helps her empathize with and heal the minipets, resolve magical disturbances, and gradually grow into a mini-witch!

title: Sword and Fairy 4
synopsis: For the sake of their cultivation endeavors, the Qionghua Sect sent its elders to forge two swords, Wangshu and Xihe, and sought two disciples to wield them in dual cultivation, attempting to bind the demon realm and seize its immense spiritual power. This ultimately triggered a great war between humans and demons, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides. During this time, Su Yu, the host of Wangshu, disagreed with the Qionghua Sect's cultivation philosophy and left the sect with Yun Tianqing. The demon realm seized the opportunity to escape, and the Qionghua Sect's leader perished in the war. The two married on Qingluan Peak and had a son, Yun Tianhe. They both died young due to the icy cold that invaded their bodies. Young Yun Tianhe grew up alone on Qingluan Mountain. He was unaware of his parents' past, and the unexpected arrival of Han Lingsha set the wheels of fate turning once more. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Etopirika: Omoi wo Tsumugu Tori
titleNative: エトピリカ～想いを紡ぐ鳥～
synopsis: Etopirika ~A bird that spins thoughts~ is an animation created based on the testimonies of former island residents of the Northern Territories. We want many people, including young people, to learn more about what happened in the Northern Territories at the end of the war, and the harsh experience of being forced to flee their homeland by former islanders, and to create momentum for the return of the Northern Territories. It was created with the purpose of increasing.

title: Ygg's bird
synopsis: We are all living in a food chain. All the living beings support each other as predator-prey relationship in the balance of nature. Yet there is a huge and ferocious bird. It is so brutal that all the creatures are afraid of it... Everything repeats itself, slightly changing its form. Graduate Work 2011, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
